cards.classes: bg-zinc-900/50 border border-zinc-800/60 backdrop-blur-sm hover:border-zinc-700 transition-colors

inputs.classes: bg-zinc-950 border-zinc-800 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:border-indigo-500 placeholder:text-zinc-600

kanban_board.column_style: bg-zinc-900/30 border border-zinc-800/50 rounded-lg p-3 min-w-[280px]
kanban_board.card_style: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 p-3 shadow-sm hover:border-zinc-700 cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing mb-2

modals.content: bg-zinc-950 border border-zinc-800 shadow-2xl p-0 overflow-hidden

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL FONTS: Add the Google Fonts import to public/index.html first.
TAILWIND CONFIG: Update tailwind.config.js to extend colors with the specific 'zinc' palette defined in colors.palette.
SHADCN OVERRIDES: When using shadcn components, strip the default 'radius' variable if it conflicts with 'rounded-md'. Force darker backgrounds.
LAYOUT: Use the 'dashboard_grid' structure for the main Overview page.
KANBAN: Ensure the Kanban board scrolls horizontally (overflow-x-auto) and columns have fixed widths.
AUTH PAGE: Use the 'login_bg' image as a split-screen background (50% width) on the right side.
DATA-TESTID: Add data-testid attributes to all inputs, buttons, and drag handles.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
